About

Empowering Through
Vocational Education

A dedicated and highly motivated Trainer and Assessor with extensive experience delivering vocational training to international students at Registered Training Organisations across Australia and the United States.

My work is driven by clear communication, in-depth industry knowledge, and a genuine passion for empowering individuals through hospitality education — underpinned by a kitchen career grounded in classical technique and modern Australian produce.
